name: datetime
title: Extended Datetime Functions
description: Additional datetime functions not available in the built-in set: isBefore, isAfter, toEpoch, fromEpoch, isWeekend, isWeekday

functions.name: isBefore
functions.description: Returns true if d1 is strictly before d2. Accepts any datetime string parseable by Flogo (RFC3339, ISO 8601, etc.).

functions.name: isAfter
functions.description: Returns true if d1 is strictly after d2.

functions.name: toEpoch
functions.description: Converts a datetime string to Unix epoch milliseconds (int64).

functions.name: fromEpoch
functions.description: Converts Unix epoch milliseconds to an RFC3339 UTC datetime string.

functions.name: isWeekend
functions.description: Returns true if the given datetime falls on Saturday or Sunday.

functions.name: isWeekday
functions.description: Returns true if the given datetime falls on Monday through Friday.
